title: set #[...]
manager: A set literal `#[a b c]` for unordered, de-duplicated membership — the right type whenever "which things are present" matters and order and count don't. Backed by the container protocol so `in`, map, and filter all work, and value-based so two sets with the same members are equal, which means set equality does the obvious thing instead of comparing insertion order.
cs: set type + `#[ ]` literal; value equality; membership via `in` (W6.35); container protocol (W6.43).
